response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience, with a strong recent track record in TypeScript and Node.js across product companies (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. He has genuine depth in testing culture (TDD, test libraries, workshops), cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and a CS degree. The main gaps are stack-specific: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, React appears in only one role while much of his frontend history is Ember.js, and Kotlin is absent with only light Java. These are learnable for someone with his breadth, so an interview is warranted to probe React/Nest.js depth.
strengths: 13+ years of professional fullstack experience with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js product work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, matching the role's AI agent requirement
Deep testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; backend framework fit is unproven
Frontend history is Ember.js-heavy with React evidenced in only one role
No Kotlin and limited Java exposure for the secondary backend stack; Vitest/Playwright not mentioned

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js/React depth and Kotlin from target stack
